summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to the UAE are subject to dangerous-goods transport controls. UN Manual of Tests and Criteria subsection 38.3 test evidence and a lithium battery test summary are expected for lithium cells and batteries before air, sea, or road transport, independent of UAE market-access conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 运往阿联酋的锂电芯和电池受危险货物运输管制。锂电芯和电池在航空、海运或道路运输前通常需要UN《试验和标准手册》第38.3小节测试证据及锂电池测试概要，该要求独立于阿联酋市场准入合格评定。
summary.zht: 運往阿聯酋的鋰電芯和電池受危險貨物運輸管制。鋰電芯和電池在航空、海運或道路運輸前通常需要UN《試驗和標準手冊》第38.3小節測試證據及鋰電池測試概要，該要求獨立於阿聯酋市場准入合格評定。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3
UN dangerous-goods lithium battery test summary expectation

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, dangerous-goods classification documents, and packaging evidence for lithium batteries before export. These transport documents remain necessary even when the product also has Chinese GB, CQC, IEC, or customer test reports.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常在锂电池出口前准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、危险货物分类文件和包装证据。即使产品同时具备中国GB、CQC、IEC或客户检测报告，这些运输文件仍然需要。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常在鋰電池出口前準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、危險貨物分類文件和包裝證據。即使產品同時具備中國GB、CQC、IEC或客戶檢測報告，這些運輸文件仍然需要。

gap.en: Do not treat IEC 62619, IEC 62933, GB/T 36276, or GB 44240 evidence as a substitute for UN 38.3 transport testing. The transport file should match the actual cell or battery model, state of charge controls, package configuration, and shipping mode used for the UAE consignment.
gap.zh: 不得将IEC 62619、IEC 62933、GB/T 36276或GB 44240证据视为UN 38.3运输测试的替代。运输文件应与阿联酋货批实际使用的电芯或电池型号、荷电状态控制、包装配置和运输方式一致。
gap.zht: 不得將IEC 62619、IEC 62933、GB/T 36276或GB 44240證據視為UN 38.3運輸測試的替代。運輸文件應與阿聯酋貨批實際使用的電芯或電池型號、荷電狀態控制、包裝配置和運輸方式一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where the shipment is in UN 38.3 lithium cell or battery scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where lithium cells or batteries are shipped as dangerous goods or under lithium battery transport provisions

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not a UAE product approval. A BESS export file should include UN 38.3 and lithium battery test summary documents in addition to any UAE conformity, IEC safety, fire-safety, and project documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输关口，不是阿联酋产品批准。BESS出口文件除阿联酋合格评定、IEC安全、消防安全和项目文件外，还应包括UN 38.3及锂电池测试概要文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸關口，不是阿聯酋產品批准。BESS出口文件除阿聯酋合格評定、IEC安全、消防安全和項目文件外，還應包括UN 38.3及鋰電池測試概要文件。
